introSection: Misaki Park (みさき公園) was an amusement park located in the town of Misaki in Osaka Prefecture, Japan, operated by Nankai Electric Railway Co., Ltd. The park was opened on April 1, 1957, as the 70th anniversary of Nankai Railway.

sections.title: Park outline
sections.content:
The park consisted of an amusement park, a zoo, a dolphin show venue, and a large outdoor pool. The outdoor pool was opened only in summer.

The park was near Misaki-koen Station on the Nankai Main Line.

sections.title: Access
sections.content: Misaki Park was located near the Misaki-kōen Station of the Nankai Main Line, of which is also operated by Nankai Electric Railway.

fullText:
Misaki Park (みさき公園) was an amusement park located in the town of Misaki in Osaka Prefecture, Japan, operated by Nankai Electric Railway Co., Ltd. The park was opened on April 1, 1957, as the 70th anniversary of Nankai Railway.

The park consisted of an amusement park, a zoo, a dolphin show venue, and a large outdoor pool. The outdoor pool was opened only in summer.

The park was near Misaki-koen Station on the Nankai Main Line.

Misaki Park was located near the Misaki-kōen Station of the Nankai Main Line, of which is also operated by Nankai Electric Railway.


 * Official website
categories: Buildings and structures in Osaka Prefecture
